heroTitle: Build a resume that lands your next job
heroDescription: Build, customize, and optimize your resume professionally with the help of AI.

editor.title: AI-Powered Resume Writing
editor.desc: Watch AI turn weak bullets into quantified achievements — with a live ATS score that updates as you write.

bullets.0: AI rewrites vague bullets into measurable, recruiter-ready results
bullets.1: Live ATS score that updates with every edit
bullets.2: One-click enhancement for any section of your resume

tailoring.title: Precision Resume Tailoring
tailoring.desc: Paste a job description and AI rewrites your resume to match in 30 seconds. See the before and after instantly.

bullets.0: Automatically matches keywords from any job description
bullets.1: Before/after comparison shows exactly what changed
bullets.2: Raises your ATS match score with precision

portfolio.title: Public Portfolio Website
portfolio.desc: Turn your resume into a beautiful personal site with themes, projects, and a shareable link — zero design skills needed.

bullets.0: Auto-synced from your resume — always up to date
bullets.1: Shareable link with a custom slug
bullets.2: Themed layouts that update with one click

interview.title: AI Interview Practice
interview.desc: Get scored on real interview questions with AI feedback on every answer. Practice any role, any industry.

bullets.0: Real-time voice recognition — just speak naturally
bullets.1: AI scores each answer and gives specific tips
bullets.2: Practice any industry, role, or question type

tracker.title: Kanban Job Tracker
tracker.desc: Visualize every application at a glance. Drag cards across your pipeline and never lose track of an opportunity.

bullets.0: Kanban board with drag-and-drop pipeline stages
bullets.1: Status history so you always know where things stand
bullets.2: Analytics show your application funnel at a glance

arabicResumeDescription: Create, customize, and optimize your resume with AI helper.
heroSubheading: AI that builds, tailors, and lands your next job.
trustSubtitle: Specific protections built into the platform — not marketing language.

trustItems.hiddenEmailTitle: Your email stays hidden from bots
trustItems.hiddenEmailBody: Contact info on your portfolio is shielded from automated scrapers. Only real visitors clicking the button can reach you.
trustItems.controlVisibilityTitle: You control who sees your portfolio
trustItems.controlVisibilityBody: One toggle makes your portfolio public or private. No approval steps, no extra hoops.
trustItems.aiNoSpamTitle: AI can't be spammed on your behalf
trustItems.aiNoSpamBody: The AI chat on your portfolio page uses session tokens, so no one can run up costs using your public page.
trustItems.resumeDataYoursBody: Stored securely, never shared with third parties, and never used to train AI models.

footerSecureNotice: Your data is encrypted and secure
unfairAdvantage: Your unfair advantage in the job market.

wisehire.subheading: AI that screens candidates, writes job descriptions, and surfaces your best hires — in minutes, not hours.

brief.label: Brief Generator
brief.desc: AI reads a CV and produces a structured candidate brief with match score, strengths, red flags, and interview questions — in under 10 seconds.

jd.label: JD Writer
jd.desc: Type a job title, click generate. AI writes a complete, bias-aware job description tailored to the role and your company voice.

bulk.label: Bulk Screening
bulk.desc: Upload multiple CVs at once. AI scores and ranks every applicant against your role criteria — no manual reading required.

pool.label: Talent Pool
pool.desc: Never lose a great candidate. Build a searchable pool of past applicants you can re-engage for future roles instantly.

offers.label: Offer Tracker
offers.desc: Track every offer from sent to signed. See salary, status, and next steps for each candidate in one live view.

pipeline.label: Pipeline Board
pipeline.desc: Visualise your full hiring funnel with drag-and-drop kanban. Every candidate, every stage, every status — at a glance.

waitlistModal.enterEaCodeDesc: Got a code? Skip the waitlist and set up your WiseHire account right now.
